positive: A minimalist, abstract celestial animal illustration. Subject is a stylized, elegant leaping fox silhouette against a cosmic, nebulous background. The fox is rendered in deep indigo and gold ink. The background features soft gradients of turquoise, lavender, and magenta, suggesting distant galaxies and scattered constellations. Use a high-contrast, woodcut or linocut art style, with clean, bold edges and perfect symmetry. The composition should be centered and suitable for printing large on apparel, ensuring solid color fields and strong graphic impact. The overall mood is mystical and adventurous. Studio lighting, ultra-detailed, vectors.
negative: blurry, grainy, artifacts, lowres, noise, text, watermark, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, photorealistic, bokeh, dirty, messy, jpeg artifacts
